channel.title: Authors on Matt Hammond | Professional Pilot | CEH | Sec+ | Splunk | Homelab
channel.description: Recent content in Authors on Matt Hammond | Professional Pilot | CEH | Sec+ | Splunk | Homelab

item.title: Matt Hammond
item.description: I am a prior military professional with military aviation experience and Special Operations experience. As well as civilian aviation experience in helicopters and fixed wing stateside and abroad. I have turned an interest, hobby, and passion of IT related content into a strong knowledge in the areas of cyber network security analysis, DevOps tool administration, and information security system analysis by completing Security+, CEH, and Splunk Core User certifications. I will be using Github and my website to continue my learning and as a place to implement what I learn.
